approved_control.confirmed_meaning: Compile an implementation-level run that can move rust_ylong_http toward fixed-target HTTPS proxy SOTA: repair protocol correctness, verify proxy TLS/mTLS, preserve sync/async proxy semantics, create a hard test matrix, produce fair libcurl-library benchmark and causal evidence, and revise report claims.
required_answer_path: Inspect current code, tests, benchmark assets, and report claims before edits.
Patch protocol and proxy behavior only where audit evidence shows gaps.
Add endpoint TLS/mTLS and parser tests that directly produce required evidence.
Separate curl CLI observations from libcurl-library benchmark evidence.
Produce SOTA threshold and causal-performance evidence before any SOTA verified claim.
Run final independent counterexample review before goal_achieved is allowed.
what_is_not_enough_avoided: Do not stop at a gap checklist.
Do not treat 20% contest-floor or curl CLI-only results as SOTA.
Do not claim proxy mTLS from configuration APIs without endpoint success and failure tests.
Do not emit partial, blocked, planned, or unverifiable as terminal success states.

required_steps.transition: Current HTTPS proxy implementation is audited before patches are applied.
HTTPS proxy CONNECT handling follows required protocol semantics and fails closed on invalid responses.
Proxy TLS and proxy mutual TLS are verified end to end and kept distinct from origin TLS.
Sync and async proxy semantics are verified and accurately represented.
A contest-critical HTTPS proxy test matrix is implemented and run.
Benchmark methodology and claims are fair, reproducible, and correctly labeled.
README/report narrative is revised to match verified implementation and benchmark evidence.
SOTA performance status is evaluated against the predeclared numeric hard-threshold matrix.
SOTA performance advantage is causally tied to the real ylong_http_client HTTPS proxy implementation and not to benchmark-only shortcuts or mismatched baseline mechanics.
Final SOTA completion claim survives counterexample review.
